tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on

hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pool Care Madison
Trusts Most
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves technicians with 10-30 years of hands-on experience, not a summer hire with a net. New Wave Pools has served Southern Wisconsin since 2013 with PHTA-certified pros who treat every pool like their own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block">Southern Wisconsin
services.subtitle: From spring openings to winter closings and everything in between, our PHTA-certified technicians handle it all so you can enjoy your backyard.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal startup and winterization services tailored to Wisconsin's harsh climate. We protect your equipment and surfaces so your pool is ready when you are.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Flexible maintenance programs with water chemistry testing, digital reporting through your customer portal, and complete service history tracking.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Expert liner installation partnered with Merlin Industries, Latham, and TARA. Free estimates and premium options for a lasting, beautiful finish.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, and automation — our experienced technicians diagnose and resolve equipment issues efficiently, often same-visit.

cards.title: Auto Cover Services
cards.description: Installation, maintenance, and repair of automated pool covers to improve safety, reduce energy costs, and keep debris out year-round.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Programs
cards.description: Full-service commercial pool management including openings, closings, ongoing maintenance, water quality tracking, and regulatory compliance support.

steps.title: Call or Request a Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We respond quickly — because unlike other companies in Madison, we actually answer the phone.

steps.title: We Build Your Service Plan
steps.description: Our PHTA-certified technicians evaluate your pool and create a customized plan. Every detail is tracked through your digital customer portal.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays clean, safe, and swim-ready. With our one-year workmanship warranty and satisfaction guarantee, you have zero risk.

about.label: Why Madison Trusts New Wave
about.headline: Award-Winning Expertise Since 2013
about.description: New Wave Pools is a full-service, award-winning pool company rooted in Southern Wisconsin. Our lead technicians bring 10-30 years of experience, and every team member is PHTA-certified with ongoing education. We earned the Guildmaster Honor for Service Excellence and multiple Superior Service Awards because we hold ourselves to a higher standard than anyone else in the Madison area.

features.title: 10-30 Years of Technician Experience
features.description: Our lead technicians are not seasonal hires. They bring a decade or more of hands-on pool expertise to every service call.

features.title: One-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: Every job is backed by our one-year warranty. If something is not right, we come back and fix it at no additional charge.

features.title: Digital Portal & Service Tracking
features.description: Access your service history, water chemistry reports, and scheduling through our customer portal. Full transparency, every visit.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every service comes with a free estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no pressure — just honest pricing backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

guarantee.headline: Our Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service we perform, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation on doing what we say, and our multiple industry awards prove it. Your satisfaction is not negotiable — it is guaranteed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule new clients within a few business days. For urgent equipment repairs or seasonal openings, we prioritize fast turnaround. Call us at 608-444-8850 and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: What areas in Wisconsin do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Southern Wisconsin including Madison, Sun Prairie, Verona, Middleton, Cottage Grove, Stoughton, Lake Mills, Chenequa, and surrounding communities throughout the greater Madison area.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. All of our technicians are PHTA-certified (Pool & Hot Tub Alliance) and maintain continuing education. Our lead technicians bring 10 to 30 years of industry experience.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on your work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every service is backed by our one-year workmanship warranty and a satisfaction guarantee. If anything is not right, we come back and fix it at no charge.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide full-service commercial pool programs including openings, closings, ongoing maintenance, water quality tracking, and regulatory compliance support for facilities of all sizes.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: I have NEVER had a problem with them. They come exactly when scheduled, never overcharge, the employees are top notch. New Wave is the only pool company I trust.

testimonials.name: Larry T.
testimonials.text: We called every pool place in greater Madison. None even called us back. Except New Wave — we were very relieved. They showed up fast and did excellent work.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: We love them! New Wave Pools is prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. They have taken care of our pool for years and we could not be happier with the service.

Ready for Stress-Free
Pool Ownership?
contact.subtitle: Get a free estimate from Madison's award-winning pool team. No pressure, no contracts — just experienced technicians who answer the phone.
benefits: Response from real technicians, not call centers
